bead.title: [artifact-run-arch] update FEAT-001 (CLI surface refactor: run/try/work + agent passthrough + deprecations)
bead.description: Per plan: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-04-29-artifact-and-run-architecture.md. Promote run/try/work to top-level. ddx agent mounts upstream Cobra root structurally. Hard-deprecation handlers for agent run/execute-bead/execute-loop. New ddx runs / ddx tries / ddx work workers namespaces. Remove FEAT-001:92 backcompat clause. HARD PREDECESSOR for #6/#7 (FEAT-006/FEAT-010 reference old CLI forms). Atomic merge with #15.
